subtasks.title: Implement execution adapter for paper/live
subtasks.details: Route orders to simulation engine or live broker based on user mode with shared interface and common response schema.
acceptance_criteria: Same request payload works for paper and live.
Execution response includes broker order id when live.
questions: Can users switch mode mid-session for active strategy?

subtasks.title: Implement risk gates
subtasks.details: Add pre-trade checks (daily loss, max open trades, exposure limits) and post-trade checks (slippage alerts, margin utilization).
acceptance_criteria: Blocked trades emit explicit reason code.
questions: Need separate limits per index segment (NIFTY/BANKNIFTY/SENSEX)?

subtasks.title: Implement trade state machine
subtasks.details: Manage ENTRY, ACTIVE, TRAIL, EXIT states with consistent transition guards and persistence.
acceptance_criteria: Every state change recorded in event log.
questions: Should trailing rules vary by strategy or remain global?

subtasks.title: Portfolio snapshot and reconciliation
subtasks.details: Provide per-user positions, realized/unrealized PnL, and broker reconciliation tasks for divergence detection.
acceptance_criteria: Portfolio API updates near real time.
questions: How often should live reconciliation run (30s, 60s, 5m)?
